title: Krythor Providers Configuration
description: Schema for <dataDir>/config/providers.json — the list of AI provider connections.

id.description: Unique identifier for this provider. Used in agents.json to pin an agent to a specific provider.

name.description: Human-readable display name shown in the Control UI.

type.description: Provider protocol type. 'openai-compat' works with any OpenAI-compatible API (OpenRouter, Groq, LM Studio, etc.).

apiKey.description: API key for cloud providers. Use ${ENV_VAR_NAME} to read from an environment variable instead of storing plaintext.

baseUrl.description: Base URL for ollama, openai-compat, and gguf providers. Must use http:// or https://.

models.description: List of model IDs available through this provider. The first model is used by default.

isEnabled.description: Whether this provider is active. Disabled providers are skipped during model routing.

authMethod.description: Authentication method. 'none' is used for local providers (Ollama, LM Studio).

priority.description: Routing priority. Lower number = tried first. Providers with the same priority are tried in config file order.

maxRetries.description: Maximum number of retry attempts on transient failures before falling back to the next provider.

setupHint.description: Internal hint used by the setup wizard. Leave unset for manually configured providers.

OAuthAccount.description: OAuth account details, set by the Control UI after completing an OAuth flow.

displayName.description: Display name shown in the Control UI (e.g. email address).

accessToken.description: OAuth access token. Stored encrypted with the e1: prefix.

refreshToken.description: OAuth refresh token. Stored encrypted with the e1: prefix.

expiresAt.description: Unix millisecond timestamp when the access token expires.

connectedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the account was connected.
